description_long: This object depicts a modern residential neighborhood layout featuring three distinct houses, each enclosed within its own fenced yard. The houses are characterized by flat roofs, large glass windows, and clean geometric lines, typical of contemporary architecture. Each property includes landscaped green spaces, driveways, and what appear to be swimming pools or patios. The central access road divides the properties, providing vehicular and pedestrian entry. The houses are spaced apart, with ample lawns and minimal ornamental detailing, emphasizing open, functional outdoor areas. The overall scene is organized, with clear boundaries and a focus on privacy and modern living.
description: A modern residential neighborhood with three flat-roofed houses, large windows, fenced yards, and landscaped lawns, divided by a central access road.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the neighborhood from above and behind, highlighting the rear yards, pools, and the overall property layout.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a frontal perspective, displaying the main facades, entryways, and the central road dividing the properties.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side angle, emphasizing the depth of the lots, the side profiles of the houses, and the arrangement of green spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a street-level approach, focusing on the front fences, driveways, and the main entrances to each house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryways with flat doors, small porches or steps, and no decorative columns or overhangs
